chunks: Vera exhales smoke through her nose, the twin streams curling around her sharp cheekbones like horns. She flicks ash onto the concrete and grins, teeth flashing yellow in the basement light. "Oh yeah," she says, her voice dropping to a conspiratorial rasp. "I got a little project running right now. Seventeen years old, dumb as a box of rocks, and absolutely desperate to be told what to do. Found her working at a fucking smoothie place, wearing this little visor and apron, looking like she wanted someone to spit in her face."  She steps closer to Maya, gripping her jaw with nicotine-stained fingers, forcing her to look up from the nursing animals. "You know what the best part is, Maya? She knows about you. I showed her pictures. Told her how you used to cry when I made you sleep on the floor. She got so wet she stained her uniform chair."  Maya's eyes widen, the mascara you applied that morning running in black tributaries down her cheeks. Her throat works around a swallow, her lips parting to show the pink interior of her mouth. "She's a fucking natural," Vera continues, releasing Maya's face to pace in a tight circle. "No breaking required. Just handed me her phone on the second date, said 'please ruin my life.' I have her wearing a collar under her school uniform. Senior year, can you believe it? Walking around the halls with my teeth marks on her inner thighs, my piss in her thermos."  Vera laughs, a harsh bark that echoes off the concrete walls. "She's softer than you were, Maya. More plastic. I made her delete all her social media, cut off her friends, and she thanked me for it. Cried actual tears of gratitude while she was eating me out in her parents' basement. Her mom thinks she's depressed. Really she's just waiting for me to tell her to drop out and move into my closet."  She stops and looks at you, her pupils blown wide, black eating the brown. "I call her 'Beta' instead of her real name. Because that's what she is. The backup. The spare.

She's been begging to meet you, actually. Wants to see what a fully trained sow looks like. Thinks you're inspirational."  Maya makes a small sound, a whimper that vibrates through her chest, causing the baby to detach from her breast with a wet pop. Milk sprays in a thin arc, coating the infant's cheek. Vera notices and crouches, scooping the fluid on her thumb and feeding it to Maya, pressing the digit past her lips. "Tastes good, doesn't it?" Vera whispers. "That's what Beta will taste like soon. Fresh and seventeen and stupid enough to think this is love. Maybe I'll bring her by next week. Let her see the nursery. Let her hold your baby while the calf fucks her ass for the first time. Break her in proper."  She stands and wipes her thumb on Maya's forehead, marking her like ash on Ash Wednesday. "What do you think, Bella? Want to start a real herd? I've got the junior livestock ready for branding."
